channel.title: Cloud-Security on The Hidden Port
channel.description: Recent content in Cloud-Security on The Hidden Port

item.title: 5 Critical AWS Security Misconfigurations (2026 Edition) – How to Find & Fix Them
item.description: A practical guide to the five most common AWS security misconfigurations in 2026 and how to fix them using the AWS Console and Terraform.

item.title: AWS Security Checklist 2026: 30+ Controls for IAM, EC2 & S3
item.description: Free 2026 AWS security checklist with 30+ actionable controls. Covers IAM hardening, S3 lockdown, CloudTrail logging, encryption, and compliance basics.

item.title: Meeting CIS Benchmarks for EC2: A Practical Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guidance on meeting CIS Benchmarks for EC2 in AWS. Learn how to map controls, audit compliance, and automate remediation using AWS services and open-source tools.

item.title: eJPTv2: Prep Strategy, Resources & Honest Review
item.description: How I prepared for the eJPTv2 exam coming from cloud security. Study plan, TryHackMe labs, INE course review, and tips for the Junior Penetration Tester cert.

item.title: Replace SSH with Session Manager: Secure EC2 Access Guide
item.description: Stop using SSH keys and bastion hosts. Set up AWS Systems Manager Session Manager for secure, auditable EC2 access with no inbound ports.

item.title: EC2 Hardening Guide: Secure AWS Instances Step by Step
item.description: Harden EC2 instances with IAM least privilege, OS lockdown, encryption, logging, and CIS benchmark checks. Practical guide with console and Terraform examples.

item.title: AWS Security Monitoring Tools: Setup & Best Practices
item.description: Set up AWS security monitoring with GuardDuty, CloudTrail, Security Hub, and EventBridge. Practical architectures for threat detection on any budget.

item.title: AWS Temporary Credentials & IAM Roles: Security Best Practices
item.description: How to use IAM roles, STS, and temporary credentials securely. Covers least privilege, session policies, credential expiration, and common mistakes to avoid.

item.title: AWS Incident Response Guide for Small Security Teams
item.description: Build an AWS incident response process using CloudTrail, GuardDuty, and automation. Includes free playbook template, forensic steps, and Terraform code.

item.title: AWS Incident Response Playbook Template (Free)
item.description: Free AWS incident response playbook with isolation workflows, evidence collection steps, and post-incident reporting checklists. Ready to use.

item.title: How I Passed the AWS Certified Security – Specialty (SCS-C02) Exam in 2025
item.description: My real-world journey passing the AWS Certified Security – Specialty (SCS-C02) exam. Study strategies, mistakes, resources, and tips for future candidates.
